description_long: This object is a classic shotgun with a full wooden stock and a metal barrel. The stock is made of dark-stained wood, smoothly contoured for shoulder support, and the fore-end is also wooden, matching the stock. The barrel is long, cylindrical, and metallic, showing a slightly weathered, matte finish. A prominent lever is visible beneath the receiver, indicating a lever-action mechanism. The trigger guard is large and rounded, integrated with the lever, and there are no visible external magazines or pump mechanisms. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for practical use in urban or rural environments.
description: A lever-action shotgun with a full wooden stock and a long, weathered metal barrel, featuring a prominent lever and rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full wooden stock, long metal barrel, and the lever beneath the receiver.
description_view_1: Barrel-end view highlighting the cylindrical shape of the barrel and the narrow profile of the stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, metal barrel, and lever, mirroring the first side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, standard length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: Large, rounded trigger guard integrated with the lever, no finger grooves or reinforcement visible
